sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Rentokil Initial Discloses BlackRock Lifting Stake to 13%
feed.summary: BlackRock Inc. has increased its total voting stake in Rentokil Initial (RTO) to 13%, comprising 10.44% through shares and 2.56% via financial instruments. This move, disclosed on April 20, indicates continued institutional confidence in Rentokil Initial's long-term prospects. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates RTO as Neutral, citing steady profitability and free cash flow but also noting recent top-line contraction and a relatively expensive valuation.

feed.title: GE HealthCare, DeepHealth Expand Mammography Collaboration
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has expanded its collaboration with DeepHealth to further innovation and adoption of advanced AI-powered mammography tools internationally. This partnership integrates DeepHealth’s Breast Suite AI with GE HealthCare’s Pristina Via mammography system, aiming to enhance breast cancer detection and operational efficiency. The expanded offering includes new applications like ProFound Pro and Safeguard Review, designed to provide more accurate and timely cancer detection, particularly in complex and dense breast cases.

feed.title: MSCI beats Q1 estimates, delivers muted guidance By Investing.com
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. (NYSE:MSCI) reported first-quarter results that surpassed Wall Street expectations, with adjusted EPS of $4.55 and revenue of $850.8 million. The company's shares remained largely unchanged in pre-market trading, despite strong growth in its Index segment and improved retention rates. MSCI maintained its full-year 2026 guidance and announced a quarterly dividend of $2.05 per share.

feed.title: Scotiabank Adjusts PT on Eversource Energy to $63 From $66, Maintains Sector Underperform Rating
feed.summary: Scotiabank has lowered its price target for Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES) to $63 from $66, while reiterating a Sector Underperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects the bank's updated outlook for the utility company. The article also provides recent analyst actions for Eversource Energy from other firms.

feed.title: Barclays cuts Sunrun stock price target on volume concerns By Investing.com
feed.summary: Barclays has reduced its price target for Sunrun Inc. (NASDAQ: RUN) shares from $23 to $14, maintaining an Equalweight rating, due to anticipated seasonal volume declines and the impact of affiliate cuts. The firm expects Sunrun to increasingly rely on asset sales in 2026 and prioritize deleveraging, given its high debt-to-equity ratio of 4.74 and $14.8 billion in total debt. This follows the company's strong Q4 revenue report, but several other analysts have also revised their outlooks, with some downgrading the stock and reducing price targets.

feed.title: Veralto (VLTO) Projected to Post Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Veralto (NYSE:VLTO) is expected to announce its Q1 2026 earnings on Tuesday, April 28th, with analysts projecting $1.02 EPS and $1.3999 billion in revenue. The company previously reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates by $0.06 per share. Several institutional investors have recently increased their stakes in Veralto, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $107.56.

feed.title: HEINZ Turns the 57th Pick Into “Mr. 57” at This Year’s NFL Draft
feed.summary: HEINZ is launching a new NFL Draft tradition by designating the 57th pick as "Mr. 57," a tribute to the iconic number on its bottles. The inaugural "Mr. 57" will receive a custom jacket, a lifetime supply of HEINZ Ketchup, and a partnership opportunity, with NFL legend Devin Hester helping to introduce the new tradition. Additionally, HEINZ is partnering with Uber Eats to offer fans $25 off orders when the 57th pick is announced, and will hold a citywide takeover in Pittsburgh during the Draft.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman beats estimates as strong demand continues
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) exceeded analyst expectations for its first-quarter earnings and revenue, driven by strong demand and a significant sales increase in its Aeronautics Systems segment. The defense contractor reported EPS of $6.14 on revenue of $9.88 billion, with operating income surging 73%. Despite the strong performance, shares saw a slight decline.

feed.title: Foundation Medicine Expands Existing Collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb to Develop a Next-Generation Sequencing Companion Diagnostic to Identify Patients with Homozygous MTAP Deletion
feed.summary: Foundation Medicine announced an expansion of its collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb to develop a next-generation sequencing-based companion diagnostic, FoundationOne CDx. This diagnostic aims to identify cancer patients with homozygous MTAP deletion, a challenging biomarker to detect, for an investigational targeted therapy. This partnership seeks to advance precision oncology by accurately identifying eligible patients for biomarker-driven treatments.

feed.title: Ryder Returns to ACT Expo 2026 to Spotlight Advanced Vehicle Technology Solutions & Industry Expertise
feed.summary: Ryder System, Inc. will participate in the Advanced Clean Transportation (ACT) Expo 2026 to showcase its expertise in next-generation logistics and vehicle technologies, including emission reduction solutions. Ryder executives will speak on automation, last-mile delivery, and EV proliferation, highlighting the company's RyderElectric+ solution. The company aims to help customers integrate advanced vehicle technologies through practical and scalable solutions.

feed.title: Bernstein Adjusts Price Target on W.W. Grainger to $1,125 From $1,052, Maintains Market Perform Rating
feed.summary: Bernstein has increased its price target for W.W. Grainger (NYSE: GWW) to $1,125 from $1,052, while maintaining a Market Perform rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions, including RBC trimming its price target and Jefferies increasing theirs, indicating varying outlooks on the industrial supplies distributor. W.W. Grainger specializes in the distribution of maintenance, repair, and operating equipment, with significant operations in North America.

feed.title: Richards Merrill & Peterson Inc. Buys 1,505 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
feed.summary: Richards Merrill & Peterson Inc. increased its stake in Costco Wholesale Corporation by 13.5% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 1,505 shares and bringing its total holdings to 12,680 shares valued at $10.935 million. This makes Costco its third-largest position, accounting for 4.2% of the firm's portfolio. The company also recently raised its quarterly dividend by 13.1% to $1.47 per share, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $1,045.97.

feed.title: News Releases
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill announced the return of its popular Chipotle Honey Chicken, which was the highest-performing limited-time offering in 2025. Starting April 28, the protein, known for its "swicy" flavor profile, will be available in North America and Europe, including a new High Protein Cup option. To celebrate, Chipotle is offering a $0 delivery fee on Chipotle Honey Chicken orders placed through its app or website from April 28 to May 11.

feed.title: Ford faces recall problem unmatched by other automakers, study shows
feed.summary: A new study by iSeeCars.com reveals that Ford Motor Co. recalled 19.6 million vehicles in the past year, exceeding the combined total of all other automakers, and its models dominate the list for projected lifetime recalls. Despite Ford's claims of improving quality in newer vehicles and decreasing warranty costs, the study highlights ongoing concerns, with its brands Lincoln Aviator, Lincoln Corsair, Ford Maverick, and Ford Bronco ranking among the models with the most predicted recalls. In contrast, Mercedes-Benz models have the fewest recalls, and Tesla has significantly reduced its recall numbers by utilizing over-the-air fixes.

feed.title: Synchrony’s Profit Rose As Card Spending Stayed Resilient
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial reported a higher Q1 profit due to increased net interest income and reduced credit-loss provisions, alongside steady credit card spending. The company also announced a new $6.5 billion share buyback plan, signaling confidence in its financial strength. However, the market remains cautious about potential impacts of inflation and high everyday costs on consumer delinquencies and regulatory scrutiny on elevated credit card APRs.

feed.title: An ice cream maker cut inventory work by up to 4 hours with new tech
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation and Chocolate Shoppe Ice Cream announced significant improvements in the ice cream maker's operations using the Plex Smart Manufacturing Platform. Key achievements include a 27% (95%) improvement in inventory accuracy, 18% reduction in raw material inventory, and a 3-4 hour reduction in on-hand inventory management work. The platform replaced manual tracking systems, providing real-time data for better production, quality control, and traceability.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation posts Q2 results May 5, call starts 7:30 a.m.
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) is scheduled to release its second-quarter fiscal 2026 results on Tuesday, May 5, before the market opens. A conference call to discuss these results will be held at 7:30 a.m. CDT on the same day. Interested parties can access the webcast and presentation materials on the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Tigress Financial Partners Raises Booking Holdings (BKNG) Price Target, Keeps Buy Rating
feed.summary: Tigress Financial Partners has increased its price target for Booking Holdings (BKNG) to $260 and maintained a Buy rating. This decision follows Booking Holdings' Q4 and full-year 2025 results, which demonstrated strong momentum in its AI-powered "Connected Trip" initiative and growing platform opportunities. The firm highlights Booking Holdings' leading role in the AI-driven global travel market, supported by strong demand and anticipated tailwinds from the upcoming World Cup.

feed.title: Moderna lines up 3 investor conference webcasts in May 2026
feed.summary: Moderna (Nasdaq: MRNA) announced its participation in three investor conferences in May 2026: the BofA Securities Healthcare Conference on May 12, the RBC Global Healthcare Conference on May 19, and the Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference on May 28. Live webcasts of these presentations will be available on Moderna's investor relations website, with replays archived for at least 30 days. This announcement follows several recent company updates, including positive regulatory opinions and patent settlements.

feed.title: Water utility serving 1.7 million Missourians ties Earth Day to action
feed.summary: Missouri American Water celebrated Earth Day by highlighting its commitment to environmental stewardship, infrastructure investment, and community engagement. The company, which serves 1.7 million people, engaged employees in volunteer initiatives like cleanups and participated in Earth Day events. They also shared water-saving tips and promoted safe disposal of medications.

feed.title: Tractor Supply (NASDAQ: TSCO) posts Q1 2026 growth but lower EPS
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company reported a 3.6% increase in Q1 2026 net sales to $3.59 billion, driven by new store openings and a 0.5% rise in comparable store sales. Despite this growth, the company experienced a decline in profitability, with net income falling 8.3% to $164.5 million and diluted EPS decreasing to $0.31, largely due to higher SG&A expenses. Management reaffirmed its fiscal year 2026 financial outlook, projecting continued net sales and comparable store sales growth, along with diluted EPS guidance of $2.13 to $2.23.

feed.title: (DGX) Quest Diagnostics Expects 2026 Adjusted EPS Range $10.63 - $10.83, vs. FactSet Est of $10.63
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics (DGX) announced its expectation for 2026 adjusted Earnings Per Share (EPS) to be in the range of $10.63 to $10.83, aligning with FactSet's estimate of $10.63. The company also anticipates 2026 revenue to fall between $11.78 billion and $11.90 billion, compared to FactSet's estimate of $11.76 billion. These projections follow the release of their Q1 earnings, where Quest Diagnostics reported revenue of $2.90 billion and adjusted EPS of $2.50, both surpassing FactSet estimates.

feed.title: Capital One Financial Likely To Report Higher Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts
feed.summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) is projected to report higher Q1 earnings with analysts expecting $4.67 per share, up from $4.06 last year, and revenue of $15.37 billion. Several top analysts have recently reiterated their ratings, mostly in the "Buy" or "Overweight" categories, while slightly adjusting price targets. This comes as the company prepares to release its earnings after the closing bell on Tuesday, April 21.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (DGX) Quest Diagnostics Incorporated Reports Q1 Revenue $2.90B, vs. FactSet Est of $2.83B
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics Incorporated (DGX) reported its Q1 revenue of $2.90 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $2.83 billion. The company also announced adjusted EPS of $2.50 per share, which exceeded the FactSet estimate of $2.37. Additionally, Quest Diagnostics expects its 2026 revenue to be in the range of $11.78 billion to $11.90 billion and adjusted EPS between $10.63 and $10.83.

feed.title: Susquehanna Adjusts PT on ConocoPhillips to $149 From $121, Maintains Positive Rating
feed.summary: Susquehanna has increased its price target for ConocoPhillips (COP) shares to $149 from the previous $121. The firm also maintained a "Positive" rating on the oil and gas exploration and production company. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from Susquehanna regarding ConocoPhillips's valuation.

feed.title: Bank of America Corp. stock (US0605051046): Why does its diversified banking model matter more for U.S. investors now?
feed.summary: Bank of America's diversified banking model, combining consumer, commercial, and investment services, offers resilience and growth potential for investors, particularly in the U.S. and English-speaking markets. This model, supported by strong retail banking, commercial lending, and digital transformation, positions the company to navigate economic shifts and deliver steady revenue streams. The article highlights the stock's relevance for investors seeking stability, dividend income, and exposure to the U.S. economy's banking backbone amidst changing market conditions.

feed.title: TD Cowen Lowers Thermo Fisher (TMO) Price Target, Keeps Buy Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has lowered its price target on Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO) from $683 to $625 while maintaining a Buy rating. The firm raised its Q1 EPS estimate to $5.21 and expects 1% organic growth for the quarter, despite a negative impact from one less day and a customer shutdown. TD Cowen anticipates Q1 to be the low point for EPS growth, with stronger organic growth accelerating in the second half of 2026 driven by pharma strength and preclinical improvements.

feed.title: Smith Salley Wealth Management Decreases Stock Position in Emerson Electric Co. $EMR
feed.summary: Smith Salley Wealth Management significantly reduced its stake in Emerson Electric Co. (NYSE:EMR) by 75.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 16,686 shares and retaining 5,475 shares valued at $727,000. Despite recent insider selling totaling $2.12 million from executives like VP Nicholas J. Piazza and Director Matthew S. Levatich, analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with a target price of $162.38. Emerson Electric recently exceeded quarterly EPS estimates, provided positive FY2026 guidance, and currently trades around $146.82.

feed.title: Stifel Adjusts Price Target on J.M. Smucker to $100 From $120, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Stifel has adjusted its price target for J.M. Smucker (SJM) to $100, down from $120, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This news comes amidst other analyst adjustments and company announcements, including J.M. Smucker's recent declaration of a quarterly dividend of $1.10 per share. The article also provides a company profile detailing J.M. Smucker's business segments in coffee, food, and animal nutrition products.

feed.title: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) Stock Rating Upgraded by Tudor Pickering
feed.summary: Tudor Pickering has upgraded Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) stock from a "hold" to a "strong-buy" rating. This upgrade contributes to an overall "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for DVN among analysts, with an average price target of $53.79. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates for EPS and revenue.

feed.title: Philip Morris International Inc. $PM Shares Acquired by Summit Financial Wealth Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Summit Financial Wealth Advisors LLC significantly increased its holdings in Philip Morris International Inc. by 172.7% in Q4, now owning 10,773 shares. Despite this, two top executives, CEO Jacek Olczak and CFO Emmanuel Babeau, recently sold substantial amounts of their shares. Philip Morris currently offers a quarterly dividend of $1.47 per share and analyst consensus holds a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $192.56.

feed.title: Mass General Brigham Inc Takes Position in Revolution Medicines, Inc. $RVMD
feed.summary: Mass General Brigham Inc has acquired a new position of 344,091 shares in Revolution Medicines, Inc. (NASDAQ:RVMD) during the fourth quarter, making it their third-largest holding and representing approximately 3.4% of their portfolio. The biopharmaceutical company, Revolution Medicines, focuses on developing therapies for RAS-dependent cancers, with a high institutional ownership of 94.34% despite recent insider stock sales. Analysts have an average "Buy" rating for RVMD, with a consensus target price of $78.94.

feed.title: NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ:NXPI) Cut to "Hold" at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has downgraded NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ:NXPI) from a "strong-buy" to a "hold" rating. This decision follows similar adjustments from several other analysts who have also lowered price targets for the semiconductor company. NXP Semiconductors currently holds a "Moderate Buy" average rating with an average target price of $248.53, and recently reported strong quarterly earnings exceeding analyst expectations.

feed.title: AB SKF (OTCMKTS:SKFRY) Stock Rating Lowered by Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank Of Canada has downgraded AB SKF (OTCMKTS:SKFRY) from a "moderate buy" to a "hold" rating. This follows several other downgrades from various brokerages, leading to a consensus "Reduce" rating for the industrial products company. AB SKF recently reported Q4 earnings that missed analyst expectations, with its stock currently trading at $27.03.

feed.title: Five High-Dividend Stocks With Yields Above 3%: AbbVie, Shell, and Chevron Top the List
feed.summary: This article highlights five high-dividend stocks—AbbVie, Chevron, Shell, Enterprise Products Partners, and Realty Income—all yielding above 3%. It emphasizes companies with stable cash flow, manageable debt, and dividends supported by strong earnings, providing a brief overview of each company's 2025 financial performance and analyst sentiment. AbbVie is ranked highest for its income and growth, while Enterprise Products offers the highest yield with strong coverage.

feed.title: Smith Salley Wealth Management Has $516,000 Holdings in Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: Smith Salley Wealth Management significantly reduced its stake in Lockheed Martin (LMT) by 78% in Q4, selling 3,788 shares but still holding 1,066 shares valued at approximately $516,000. Despite mixed analyst ratings, several firms have raised price targets, contributing to a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target of $645.79. Lockheed Martin reported Q4 EPS of $5.80, missing estimates, with revenue up 9.1% to $20.32 billion, and pays a quarterly dividend of $3.45.

feed.title: Zacks Research Issues Positive Forecast for FANG Earnings
feed.summary: Zacks Research has increased its Q4 2026 EPS estimate for Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ: FANG) to $2.49, expecting continued growth despite a recent earnings miss. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $207.00. The company also raised its quarterly dividend to $1.05 per share, although insiders sold a significant number of shares recently.

feed.title: Why Public Storage Stock Is Sinking Again Today
feed.summary: Public Storage (PSA) stock is volatile due to a broader real estate sector sell-off, driven by rising Treasury yields and geopolitical tensions that diminish hopes for future rate cuts and increase borrowing costs. The market is also concerned about potential dilution and integration issues stemming from Public Storage's $10.5 billion all-stock acquisition of National Storage Affiliates. Despite some institutional investors boosting positions, analysts remain cautious ahead of the upcoming earnings report.

feed.title: Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) Q1 2026 profit surges as margins strengthen
feed.summary: Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) reported a significant increase in net profit for Q1 2026, reaching $461 million, or $0.55 per diluted share, despite flat revenue of $5.4 billion year over year. The profit surge was driven by strengthened operating margins, which hit 13%, and effective cost control, even as some segments like Completion and Production faced headwinds in North America and the Middle East. The company continued its shareholder return program, repurchasing $100 million in stock and paying a $0.17 per share dividend, while acknowledging a minor earnings impact from the Middle East conflict.

feed.title: Stifel Adjusts Price Target on Conagra Brands to $15 From $17, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Stifel has adjusted its price target for Conagra Brands (CAG) from $17 to $15, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This update reflects a modified outlook from the firm regarding Conagra's valuation. The article also notes recent insider share purchases and CEO changes at Conagra.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Corp stock (US5398301094): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is significantly changing how investors receive information about Lockheed Martin Corp stock (LMT). The update decouples Discover from traditional search, directly surfacing tailored, high-density stories about defense contract wins, program milestones, and geopolitical risks to users' mobile feeds based on their past activity. This provides retail investors with faster access to critical updates and analyses, leveling the playing field with professional investors and enabling more timely decision-making.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (HAL) Halliburton Company Reports Q1 Revenue $5.40B, vs. FactSet Est of $5.31B
feed.summary: Halliburton Company (HAL) announced its Q1 revenue reached $5.40 billion, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $5.31 billion. This flash report also noted adjusted earnings and total revenue actually fell year-over-year but profit doubled due to increased oilfield services demand in Latin America and Europe. This financial update follows several recent analyst price target adjustments for Halliburton.

feed.title: Summit Financial Wealth Advisors LLC Sells 70,261 Shares of ONEOK, Inc. $OKE
feed.summary: Summit Financial Wealth Advisors LLC significantly reduced its stake in ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) by 72.8% in the fourth quarter, selling 70,261 shares and retaining 26,279 shares valued at $1.932 million. Despite this, ONEOK reported strong Q4 results, beating earnings and revenue estimates, and provided positive FY 2026 guidance while also increasing its quarterly dividend. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for the stock with an average target price of $89.69.

feed.title: MSCI (MSCI) posts Q1 2026 double-digit growth and reaffirms full-year guidance
feed.summary: MSCI announced strong financial results for Q1 2026, with operating revenues increasing by 14.1% to $850.8 million and diluted EPS rising to $5.53. The company also reported significant growth in adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow. MSCI reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance for most financial metrics, indicating confidence in its continued performance.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (MSCI) MSCI Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $850.8M, vs. FactSet Est of $838.0M
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. reported Q1 revenue of $850.8 million, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $838.0 million. This financial update indicates a stronger performance than anticipated by market analysts.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) posts Q1 2026 growth and raises full-year outlook
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics reported robust first quarter 2026 financial results, with net revenues increasing 9.2% to $2.90 billion and adjusted diluted EPS rising 13.1% to $2.50. The company attributed this growth to strong organic expansion, increased requisition volume, and double-digit growth in Advanced Diagnostics. Consequently, Quest Diagnostics has raised its full-year 2026 revenue and EPS guidance, reflecting confidence in its strategic initiatives and continued performance.

feed.title: Middle East conflict cut Halliburton EPS by 2-3 cents in Q1
feed.summary: Halliburton announced net income of $0.55 per diluted share on $5.4 billion revenue for Q1 2026. The company noted a recovery in North America and strong international performance despite disruptions from the Middle East conflict, which impacted EPS by 2 to 3 cents. Halliburton also repurchased $100 million of common stock and paid dividends of $0.17 per share during the quarter.

feed.title: Essex Property Trust (ESS) to Release Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust (ESS) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings after market close on Tuesday, April 28th, with analysts anticipating earnings per share of $1.43 and revenue of $480.04 million. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $2.59, resulting in an annualized dividend of $10.36 and a yield of 4.0%, although its payout ratio is high at 99.52%. Analysts currently hold a consensus "Hold" rating for ESS with an average target price of $282.00.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings on Tuesday, April 28th, with analysts forecasting $1.52 EPS and $4.0681 billion in revenue. The company recently beat Q4 2025 estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.8775 per share, resulting in a 5.0% yield. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" consensus rating for EIX, with a target price of approximately $71.36.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Projected to Post Quarterly Earnings on Tuesday
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) is expected to announce its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on April 28th, with analysts forecasting EPS of $2.28 and revenue of $5.5651 billion. Despite recent analyst downgrades, the stock holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $379.77. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend and institutional investors have been modifying their holdings.
